task_completion.description: Identify the largest deleted file on the evidence drive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing forensic tools (like 'fls -d', 'ils', or Autopsy GUI) being used on '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd' to list deleted files and their sizes.

task_completion.description: Recover the content of the target deleted file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal command (e.g., 'icat') redirecting output to '/home/ga/Reports/target_file_content.bin', or an 'ls' command showing this file exists.

task_completion.description: Extract the 1024-byte raw MFT record for the target file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal command (e.g., 'dd', 'blkcat', or 'istat') extracting data to '/home/ga/Reports/target_mft_record.bin'. An 'ls -l' command showing the file size is exactly 1024 bytes is strong evidence.
A text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) open with the file '/home/ga/Reports/daubert_validation.txt', or a 'cat'/'echo' command writing to this path.

task_completion.description: Populate the validation report with the exact required keys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of '/home/ga/Reports/daubert_validation.txt' visible on screen, containing the keys: TARGET_INODE, TARGET_FILENAME, TARGET_SIZE_BYTES, MFT_RECORD_HEX_SIGNATURE, STANDARD_INFORMATION_MTIME, and FILE_NAME_MTIME, each followed by a colon and a value.

integrity.description: The agent used actual forensic tools or scripts to extract the data rather than creating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of Sleuthkit commands (fls, icat, istat, blkcat) or custom Python scripts interacting with the evidence file in the terminal history.

integrity.description: The agent operated on the correct evidence file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Commands explicitly reference '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd' as the input file.

integrity.description: The agent derived the answers from the evidence rather than hallucinating or pasting a pre-computed block.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history shows the agent querying the file system (e.g., viewing 'istat' output to find M-times and sizes) before writing those values into the report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Evidence path: /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Report path: /home/ga/Reports/daubert_validation.txt. MFT record path: /home/ga/Reports/target_mft_record.bin. File content path: /home/ga/Reports/target_file_content.bin. The report must contain exactly these keys: TARGET_INODE, TARGET_FILENAME, TARGET_SIZE_BYTES, MFT_RECORD_HEX_SIGNATURE, STANDARD_INFORMATION_MTIME, FILE_NAME_MTIME.
